case_title: IRMA ENCINAS VS. STATE OF CALIFORNIA DEPT OF TRANSPORTATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,000.00 FILED BY ENCINAS, IRMA AS TO DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA DEPT OF TRANSPORTATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-26-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-26-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IRMA ENCINAS IS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION RE: PROOF OF SERVICE ON CALIFORNIA TRANSPORTATION SERVICES FILED BY PLAINTIFF ENCINAS, IRMA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ENCINAS, IRMA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $150.00) SERVED JUN-08-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA DEPT OF TRANSPORTATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-26-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-26-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF IRMA ENCINAS APPEARED. DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA DEPT OF TRANSPORTATION APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY MARTHA DUNN, CLAIMS OFFICER. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ENCINAS, IRMA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA DEPT OF TRANSPORTATION PLAINTIFF CLAIM IS BARRED AS SHE HAS NOT COMPLIED WITH GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 911.2 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ENCINAS, IRMA AS TO DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA DEPT OF TRANSPORTATION
